emotional_impact.reason: The visceral depiction of soot-like particles coagulating into blackened human lungs is profoundly unsettling and communicates a sense of biological violation.
emotional_impact.improvement: Add a slight oily sheen or wet texture to the densest parts of the lungs to heighten the sense of physical contamination.

constraint_adherence.reason: The image perfectly adheres to all constraints, using purely metaphorical visual grammar to tell a data-driven story without a single chart element or label.
constraint_adherence.improvement: None needed; the adherence to the 'no label' and 'no chart' rules is absolute and effective.

visual_originality.reason: It successfully escapes the 'digital dashboard' AI trope by presenting the data as a physical, charcoal-based gallery installation with tactile depth.
visual_originality.improvement: Introduce a small, high-contrast human element—like a single face mask on the floor—to ground the scale and human stakes.

legibility_without_labels.reason: The transition from scattered particulates to diseased lungs is instantly recognizable as a narrative of air pollution or respiratory health, providing the 'fact' that was missing in more abstract versions.
legibility_without_labels.improvement: Sharpen the detail of the bronchial 'branches' within the lung shape to make the biological connection even more undeniable.

compositional_intent.reason: The horizontal progression follows a clear narrative timeline, while the clinical, white room environment serves as a powerful foil to the 'dirty' data on the wall.
compositional_intent.improvement: Use a harsher, more directional light source from the left to cast long shadows, making the accumulation feel like a heavy, physical substance.

one_line_verdict: A chillingly clear metaphor that transforms abstract air-quality data into a visceral biological warning through masterful physical texture.
